name: Hamburgers Au Poivre
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix meat and salt. Shape mixture into 4 patties, each about 3/4 of an inch thick.
2. Press pepper into both sides of the patties.
3. Cook the patties in a large skillet over medium-high heat, turning once, until the desired doneness is reached, about 8 minutes.
4. Drain off the fat.
5. Sprinkle cognac over the patties, immediately ignite if desired.
6. Remove patties to a warm platter.
7. Stir wine into the drippings in the skillet. Heat just to boiling, stirring constantly.
8. Serve sauce over the patties.
